headline: Jim Cramer Reveals AbbVie’s (ABBV) “Good Stuff”
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer Revealed His Big AI Investing Fear & Discussed These 20 Stocks. AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Pharmaceutical firm AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV)’s shares are up by 11% over the past year and are down by 9% year-to-date. Evercore ISI was out with optimistic coverage […]

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on AbbVie, Raises Price Target to $298
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst David Amsellem   maintains AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $294 to $298.
